name: Critica Limited
description: Critica Limited, formerly Venture Minerals Limited, is an Australian mineral exploration company focused on the discovery and development of critical mineral deposits. The company's flagship project is the Jupiter Rare Earths Project in Western Australia, which has emerged as a major clay-hosted rare earth elements discovery. Critica also holds a portfolio of other mineral assets, including the Mount Lindsay Tin-Tungsten Project in Tasmania, and is actively exploring for critical metals essential for the global energy transition.
